refined_caption: Hospital food is being cooked in a large bowl, appearing unhygienic and contaminated. The food preparation area appears to be dirty.
complaint_description: I was appalled to see the hospital food being prepared in an unhygienic manner. The food was being cooked in a large bowl that looked contaminated, and the surrounding area was dirty. This is unacceptable for a hospital that is supposed to prioritize patient health and safety.
voice_text: The hospital food is being cooked in a dirty bowl, it's really unhygienic. I'm worried about the health and safety of the patients who are being served this food.
